variables.notes: Used explicit overhead component rows rather than subtotal/detail rows. Included 'Research and Development Costs' in XSGA_COMPONENTS as well because it is a separate above-EBIT operating expense and the PROF formula subtracts XRD from XSGA_COMPONENTS.
